name: conversation mode — createProject() via API sets conversation_mode: CONVERSATION in project state (PHASE-16.1 regression guard)
description: RED (before Fix A): createProject() calls persistProjectState with overrides = { project_name, project_status } only — conversation_mode absent from response → conversation_mode_is_conversation = false → FAIL. GREEN (after Fix A): createProject() passes conversation_mode: 'CONVERSATION' in overrides → response.project.conversation_mode === 'CONVERSATION' → PASS. Tests the REAL createProject() path via in-process HTTP API server, closing the gap left by S220-S224.
